features.name: Evocation Savant
features.description: The gold and time you must spend to copy an evocation spell into your spellbook is halved.

features.name: Sculpt Spells
features.description: When you cast an evocation spell affecting creatures you can see, choose up to 1 + the spell's level of them: they automatically succeed on their saving throws and take no damage if they would normally take half.

features.name: Potent Cantrip
features.description: When a creature succeeds on a saving throw against your cantrip, it still takes half the cantrip's damage (but no additional effect).

features.name: Empowered Evocation
features.description: Add your Intelligence modifier to one damage roll of any wizard evocation spell you cast.

features.name: Overchannel
features.description: When you cast a wizard spell of 1st-5th level that deals damage, deal maximum damage. The first use is safe; each use again before a long rest deals you escalating necrotic damage that can't be reduced.

features.name: Spellcasting
features.description: You cast wizard spells using Intelligence from your spellbook; you prepare Intelligence modifier + wizard level spells each day and add new spells to the book as you level or copy them.

features.name: Arcane Recovery
features.description: Once per day when you finish a short rest, recover expended spell slots with a combined level up to half your wizard level (rounded up), none 6th level or higher.

features.name: Arcane Tradition
features.description: Your school of magic (chosen at 2nd level) grants features at 2nd, 6th, 10th, and 14th level.

features.name: Spell Mastery
features.description: Choose a 1st-level and a 2nd-level wizard spell in your spellbook: you can cast them at their lowest level without expending a spell slot while prepared.

features.name: Signature Spells
features.description: Choose two 3rd-level wizard spells as signature spells: always prepared, and you can cast each once at 3rd level without expending a spell slot per short or long rest.
